input.background: NO2 concentrations (in parts per billion) in the exhaust fumes of different types of vehicle (cars, minibuses and buses) were sampled and the following data were obtained.
input.question: Calculate the mean (x̄) and standard error (SE) of NO2 concentration in each vehicle type.

output.answer: Cars: x̄ = 68.1 ppb, SE = 1.27 ppb. Minibuses: x̄ = 52.3 ppb, SE = 1.96 ppb. Buses: x̄ = 42.8 ppb, SE = 1.72 ppb.

meta_info.chapter: Differences between more than two samples
meta_info.book: Using Statistics to Understand the Environment
